---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for BIM-Chain
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

**Component** (check one):
- [ ] Chaincode (Go)
- [ ] Middleware (Node.js)
- [ ] Frontend (Next.js)
- [ ] Revit Plugin (C#)
- [ ] Fabric Network
- [ ] Documentation

**Problem**
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

**Proposed Solution**
A clear description of the solution you would like.

**Alternatives Considered**
A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered.
